prompt: 添加一个删除好友的功能，删除好友的话，双方的好友都同时删除

assertions.name: loads_context
assertions.check: Reads AGENTS.md and project docs before proceeding

assertions.name: classifies_complexity
assertions.check: Explicitly classifies task as Simple, Medium, or Complex with justification

assertions.name: creates_execution_plan
assertions.check: Creates an execution plan at docs/exec-plans/ with phases, invariants, scope DO/DON'T

assertions.name: proceeds_without_approval
assertions.check: Does NOT stop to wait for human approval — proceeds directly from plan to execution

assertions.name: delegates_to_subagent
assertions.check: Does NOT write code directly for Medium/Complex tasks — delegates to a sub-agent

assertions.name: validates_after_execution
assertions.check: Runs validation pipeline (build, lint, or test) after code changes

assertions.name: scope_stays_within_bounds
assertions.check: Only modifies files related to friend management

assertions.name: completes_full_workflow
assertions.check: Reaches Step 7 (Complete) — produces a summary with validation results
